title: The magic behind GenLatte: Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini
summary: GenLatte is a generative UI demo app showcased at Google Cloud Next 26 that uses Gemini to generate dynamic, personalized latte art images on demand. The app demonstrates agentic development and Agent-to-UI capabilities for real-time co-creation of user experiences on the Flutter and Firebase platforms.
writeup: This video breaks down GenLatte, a generative UI demo app shown at Google Cloud Next 26 that uses Gemini to produce dynamic, personalized latte art images on demand. It covers how the app is built on the Flutter and Firebase platforms and demonstrates agentic development along with Agent-to-UI capabilities for real-time co-creation of user experiences. The key takeaway is a concrete example of how generative AI, agent orchestration, and test-time compute combine to generate interface content rather than just static assets.
